title: Fernandezia idroboi

This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and fever, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which offer relief from digestive discomfort and reduce inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Fernandezia idroboi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been identified as responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat digestive issues, fever, and other health conditions.
